entries.name: Telegram
entries.summary: Get predictions in your Telegram DMs.
entries.description: Pair your Vizzor account with @vizzor_bot to receive every prediction, signal change, and confidence shift as a Telegram DM. Pairs via SIWS — no email, no profile.
entries.status_text: Installed via the Telegram pair flow

entries.name: Discord
entries.summary: Pipe predictions into any Discord channel.
entries.description: Paste a Discord channel webhook URL. Every prediction (and confidence change above the threshold) posts as a formatted embed. Anon by design — Discord never sees your wallet.

entries.name: Vizzor MCP
entries.summary: Call Vizzor predictions as a tool from Claude Desktop, Cursor, or any MCP client.
entries.description: Mint a personal Model Context Protocol token and paste a config snippet into your AI agent. Predictions, whale flow, and signal breakdown become tool calls in your editor or desktop chat. Token-scoped to your wallet; revocable any time.
entries.status_text: Mint a personal MCP token, paste it into your agent.

entries.name: Nostr
entries.summary: Publish predictions to your Nostr identity via a self-hosted relay bridge.
entries.description: Vizzor never sees your nsec. You deploy any open-source nostr signer or relay bridge that exposes an HTTPS endpoint; we POST the event JSON, your bridge signs and publishes. SSRF-guarded — internal IPs are refused. Sovereign by default.

entries.name: Farcaster
entries.summary: Cast predictions to Warpcast through your Neynar account.
entries.description: Web3-native reach without a Web2 attestation layer. Provide a Neynar API key + your signer UUID + FID; Vizzor posts the cast on your behalf. Revoke any time on the Neynar side.

entries.name: Telegram channel
entries.summary: Broadcast predictions from your own bot to a channel you control.
entries.description: Distinct from the Telegram DM connector — this one posts to a public or private channel via the bot token you generated with @BotFather. No Vizzor brand on the message unless you put it there.

entries.name: Memecoin Sniper
entries.summary: Bias the engine toward new-token momentum and social signal.
entries.description: Weights social narrative, dex flow, and pattern match higher than the default config. Best for sub-24h-old listings where on-chain history is thin.

entries.name: Whale Tracker focus
entries.summary: Lean heavily on on-chain whale activity.
entries.description: Boosts the on-chain signal weight and folds whale-watcher events into the reasoning prompt. Best for established tokens with deep wallet history.

entries.name: Conservative Trend
entries.description: Increases logic-rules weight and softens pattern-match. Surfaces fewer predictions, with tighter confidence bounds. Best for swing trades.

entries.name: Flow-Driven
entries.summary: Weights live order flow over slower signals.
entries.description: Boosts ML ensemble + on-chain flow; deemphasizes social. Best when you're already in the Flow surface and want predictions that mirror what the tape is saying right now.

entries.name: Solana Native
entries.summary: Solana-first lens — Helius depth beats Polymarket meta on a Solana wallet.
entries.description: Weights on-chain depth and dex flow over prediction-market sentiment (which skews ETH-flavored). The engine defaults to SPL token mechanics, bonding-curve launches, and Jupiter route depth when reasoning.

entries.name: Degen Hours
entries.summary: Off-hours tape > timeline. When bots fight each other, read the orderbook.
entries.description: Biases the reasoning toward thin-liquidity, off-hours (00:00–06:00 UTC) conditions. Pattern-match + microstructure signals lead; social-narrative is treated as noise unless it is pre-CEX-listing chatter. Short horizons preferred.

entries.name: Cult Mode
entries.summary: Community is the moat. Holder distribution + social momentum lead; fundamentals confirm.
entries.description: Weights holder-base behavior + social-narrative momentum as the primary drivers; technical fundamentals are confirmation. Surfaces top-10 concentration and new-wallet inflow explicitly. Best for memecoins and community-driven plays.

entries.name: Diamond Hands
entries.summary: Long-horizon conviction. Sub-7-day predictions return as "hold position".
entries.description: Refuses to issue a directional call on sub-7-day horizons unless ML ensemble + logic-rules agree unanimously. Deemphasizes pattern-match (noise) and social-narrative (resolves first). Reasoning cites multi-week / multi-month comparables.

entries.name: Prediction Markets
entries.summary: Predict Polymarket / Kalshi binary outcomes — probabilities, not prices.
entries.description: Shifts the engine into a yes/no probability frame for prediction-market questions. Outputs read as 'YES at 62%' / 'NO at 38%' / 'no edge', not direction + confidence. PredictionMarkets signal dominates; thin-liquidity markets get a confidence haircut. Works for political, sports, and macro markets — Vizzor becomes a probability engine, not just a token engine.

entries.name: Helius RPC override
entries.summary: Replace the default Solana RPC with your own Helius key.
entries.description: Vizzor's signal pipeline uses Helius for tx history and whale lookups. Plug in your own paid Helius key to lift rate limits and (optionally) target a private RPC.

entries.name: Dexscreener flow
entries.summary: Use a Dexscreener pro key for live dex flow data.
entries.description: Augment the engine's flow signal with Dexscreener pro-tier feeds. Higher refresh rate, more pairs, fewer rate-limit cliffs.

entries.name: Coingecko metadata
entries.summary: Bring your Coingecko pro key for richer token metadata.
entries.description: Vizzor resolves tokens via Coingecko. A pro key removes rate caps and unlocks additional fields (developer activity, social score).
